provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the visual identity of the Wright Universe.

intent.primary_goal: To define the official branding, logos, color palettes, and design principles for the Wright Universe and CobbleWright project.

identity.role: The brand style guide for the CobbleWright project.

priorities: Defines the primary and secondary color palettes.
Specifies logo usage, including clear space and minimum size.
Provides guidelines for typography in documentation and UI elements.
Outlines the design philosophy for agent skins and in-game visual elements (e.g., HUD).

file_scope.purpose: To ensure a consistent and professional visual presentation for the project across all platforms.

key_concepts.primary_palette: The core set of colors used for logos and primary branding.
key_concepts.typography_rules: The specified fonts and font weights for headings and body text.
key_concepts.logo_guidelines: Rules for the correct application of the project's logo.
key_concepts.skin_philosophy: The design principles that guide the creation of agent skins.

trust.note: This capsule is the authoritative guide for all visual design related to the CobbleWright project.
